entity.label: Gittaim
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Two wine-presses, (2 Sam. 4:3; Neh. 11:33), a town probably in Benjamin to which the Beerothites fled.

nodes.label: Gittaim
nodes.description: Two wine-presses, (2 Sam. 4:3; Neh. 11:33), a town probably in Benjamin to which the Beerothites fled.

verses.text: And the Beerothites fled to Gittaim, and were sojourners there until this day.)
